command:
uv run python -c 
import urllib.request, ssl, xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

url = 'https://eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/entrez/eutils/efetch.fcgi?db=pmc&id=3265025&rettype=full&retmode=xml'
headers = {'User-Agent': 'research-bot/1.0 (mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk)'}
ctx = ssl.create_default_context(); ctx.check_hostname = False; ctx.verify_mode = ssl.CERT_NONE
req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=60, context=ctx) as resp:
    xml_data = resp.read()

root = ET.fromstring(xml_data)

def get_text_recursive(elem):
    parts = []
    if elem.text and elem.text.strip():
        parts.append(elem.text.strip())
    for child in elem:
        child_text = get_text_recursive(child)
        if child_text.strip():
            parts.append(child_text)
        if child.tail and child.tail.strip():
            parts.append(child.tail.strip())
    return ' '.join(parts)

# Build structured markdown from the XML
lines = []
lines.append('# Two distinct types of ON directionally selective ganglion cells in the rabbit retina')
lines.append('')
lines.append('**Source:** PMC3265025 / DOI: 10.1002/cne.22678')
lines.append('**Authors:** Hideo Hoshi, Lian-Ming Tian, Stephen C. Massey, Stephen L. Mills')
lines.append('**Journal:** Journal of Comparative Neurology, Vol. 519, No. 13, pp. 2509-2521, 2011')
lines.append('')

# Abstract
for abstract in root.iter('abstract'):
    abstract_text = get_text_recursive(abstract)
    if abstract_text.strip():
        lines.append('## Abstract')
        lines.append('')
        lines.append(abstract_text)
        lines.append('')
        break

# Body sections
for section in root.iter('sec'):
    # Only top-level sections or sections with title
    title_elem = section.find('title')
    if title_elem is not None and title_elem.text:
        title = title_elem.text.strip()
        lines.append(f'## {title}')
        lines.append('')
        for p in section.findall('p'):
            p_text = get_text_recursive(p)
            if p_text.strip():
                lines.append(p_text)
                lines.append('')
        # Sub-sections
        for subsec in section.findall('sec'):
            sub_title = subsec.find('title')
            if sub_title is not None and sub_title.text:
                lines.append(f'### {sub_title.text.strip()}')
                lines.append('')
            for p in subsec.findall('p'):
                p_text = get_text_recursive(p)
                if p_text.strip():
                    lines.append(p_text)
                    lines.append('')

content = '\n'.join(lines)
out_path = 'tasks/t0002_literature_survey_dsgc_compartmental_models/assets/paper/10.1002_cne.22678/files/hoshi_2011_on-dsgc.md'
with open(out_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(content)

import os
size = os.path.getsize(out_path)
print(f'Saved {size} bytes to {out_path}')
print(f'Lines: {len(lines)}')
